file.content:
---
- name: Clone dotfiles repository
  git:
    repo: https://github.com/stivce/arch.dot.git
    dest: "/home/{{ local_user }}/.dotfiles"
    update: true
    force: true
  become_user: "{{ local_user }}"

- name: Find top-level dotfiles entries
  find:
    paths: "/home/{{ local_user }}/.dotfiles"
    depth: 1
    excludes: ".git"
    file_type: any
    hidden: true
  register: dotfiles_entries

- name: Remove conflicting files or directories at symlink targets
  file:
    path: "/home/{{ local_user }}/{{ item.path | basename }}"
    state: absent
  loop: "{{ dotfiles_entries.files }}"

- name: Create symlinks for dotfiles
  file:
    src: "{{ item.path }}"
    dest: "/home/{{ local_user }}/{{ item.path | basename }}"

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# set-wallpaper — pick a wallpaper via wofi and apply matugen color scheme
set -euo pipefail

WALLPAPER_DIR="$HOME/Pictures/wallpapers"

WALLPAPER="$(find "$WALLPAPER_DIR" -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -iname '*.jpg' -o -iname '*.jpeg' -o -iname '*.png' -o -iname '*.webp' \) \
    | sort | xargs -I{} basename {} \
    | wofi --dmenu --prompt "Wallpaper" \
    | xargs -I{} realpath "$WALLPAPER_DIR/{}")"

[[ -z "$WALLPAPER" ]] && exit 0

echo "Setting wallpaper: $(basename "$WALLPAPER")"
awww img "$WALLPAPER"

echo "Generating color scheme with matugen..."
matugen image "$WALLPAPER" --source-color-index 0

# Reload kitty (SIGUSR1 reloads the config without restart)
if pgrep -x kitty &>/dev/null; then
    pkill -USR1 kitty
fi

# Reload waybar styles if running
if pgrep -x waybar &>/dev/null; then
    pkill -SIGUSR2 waybar
fi

echo "Done."
